Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Apex of Creation

Triggers: Once in a while

Thorny Thickets
4 random enemy units are entangled in a spiky vine. For 4 sec., they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). Every second during that time, exhaustion is applied to the entangled enemy units. They receive physical damage equal to 175% of the unit's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 25%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. When the spiky vine expires, the targets are disarmed for 4 sec. For the duration, the disarmed enemy units cannot use the weapon's abilities. Armor is also removed from these units. The targets lose 55% of their armor stats, and become unable to use armor abilities for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
